Arsenal are planning to increase the capacity at the Emirates by around 800 seats.

it currently sits at 59,867 - and Arsenal want to raise that number back to the sort of figure it was when the stadium first opened in 2006.

At the time of the stadium move Islington council set strict regulations that the capacity at the Emirates could be no more than 60,500.

It was announced earlier on Friday that Tottenham’s request to increase the capacity of their new stadium has been approved by Haringey Council.

That means Spurs’ new ground, which is due to be opened in 2018, will have a capacity of 61,559.

It will be the biggest club football ground in the capital and second only to Manchester United’s Old Trafford in England.

Did Arsenal have no money?

An in-depth investigation of Arsenal’s finances.

https://theshortfuse.sbnation.com/2017/9/1/16238666/arsenal-transfer-window-did-arsenal-have-no-money

- 肖像權既錢,簽字費照計人工
- 球會要保留預算續現有球員既約
- 如果球員外借時,係由借方支付佢既人工,球員歸隊後人工會加返落wage bill
- 球會玩文字遊戲,計“revenue” 唔係計“net income",姐係轉會收入可能唔當係“revenue”
- (以我理解) 阿狗財政報告係計calendar year, 轉會收入會分開一半黎計,例如阿狗賣加比爾賣到10m,但係份報告會寫5m
- 因為踢歐霸,球會會估計阿狗賺少20-30m

佢最後粗略計左阿狗d買賣令人工預算有咩變化,我唔想睇

Did Arsenal have no money?

An in-depth investigation of Arsenal’s finances.

https://theshortfuse.sbnation.com/2017/9/1/16238666/arsenal-transfer-window-did-arsenal-have-no-money

- 肖像權既錢,簽字費照計人工
- 球會要保留預算續現有球員既約
- 如果球員外借時,係由借方支付佢既人工,球員歸隊後人工會加返落wage bill
- 球會玩文字遊戲,計“revenue” 唔係計“net income",姐係轉會收入可能唔當係“revenue”
- (以我理解) 阿狗財政報告係計calendar year, 轉會收入會分開一半黎計,例如阿狗賣加比爾賣到10m,但係份報告會寫5m
- 因為踢歐霸,球會會估計阿狗賺少20-30m

佢最後粗略計左阿狗d買賣令人工預算有咩變化,我唔想睇
